steps.name: Verify settings navigation for non-admin user
Verify can see a global measure
Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804000832 Numeric categorization' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Verify projects access for Standard role
Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772803991807 substantiate-e2e' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804000828 Any medical claim' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Click getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804000828 Any medical claim' }).first()
Verify Viewer project cohort definitions access
Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804045907 Descriptive Cohort (Patients)' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804045907 Descriptive Cohort (Patients)' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Fill "1772804126123 Comparative Effectiveness Analysis Plan_Report" getByTestId('tree-search')
Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804126123 Comparative Effectiveness Analysis Plan_Report' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Click getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804126123 Comparative Effectiveness Analysis Plan_Report' }).first()
Fill "1772804126164 Descriptive Analysis Plan_Report - 1772804045907 Descriptive Cohort (Patients)" getByTestId('tree-search')

Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804126164 Descriptive Analysis Plan_Report - 1772804045907 Descriptive Cohort (Patients)' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Click getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804126164 Descriptive Analysis Plan_Report - 1772804045907 Descriptive Cohort (Patients)' }).first()
